prompt: Keep the same actor identity, face, hairstyle, outfit, scene layout and lighting from the first frame. In one continuous 6-second vertical short-drama shot, the actor slowly raises her eyes, breathes subtly, and tightens her fingers around the phone. The camera makes a slow push-in. No cuts, no new people, no wardrobe change, no scene jump.
negative_prompt: black screen, frozen frame, line art, sketch, extra person, face morphing, wardrobe drift, scene jump, subtitles, watermark
